---
id: heartbeatevt
title: "Heartbeatevt"
description: "This event represents a heartbeat signal sent periodically from a device or system to indicate its active status and provide essential metadata like uptime and event details."
sidebar_label: "Heartbeatevt"
hide_title: true

  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Heartbeatevt"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/heartBeatEVT"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This event represents a heartbeat signal sent periodically from a device or system to indicate its active status and provide essential metadata like uptime and event details.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"heartBeatEVT event payload","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"eventName":{"type":"string","example":"heartbeat","description":"Name of the event, indicating it is a heartbeat signal."},"timestamp":{"type":"string","example":"2019-08-24T14:15:22Z","description":"The timestamp when the event was generated, in ISO 8601 format."},"eventNumber":{"type":"integer","example":120,"description":"A unique identifier or sequence number for the event."},"upTime":{"type":"string","example":"5 days 4hr 3min","description":"The uptime duration of the system when the event was generated."},"data":{"anyOf":[{"title":"inventoryStatus","x-stoplight":{"id":"11cnw8c73npra"},"type":"object","properties":{"rfidStatus":{"type":"string","enum":["INPROGRESS","STOPPED"],"description":"The current status of the RFID scanning process."},"tagCount":{"type":"integer","description":"The total number of RFID tags scanned in the current operation."},"scanCount":{"type":"integer","description":"The total number of scan attempts made during the operation."}}},{"title":"batteryAlert","x-stoplight":{"id":"gcmvpvvellk4h"},"type":"object","properties":{"status":{"type":"string","enum":["LOW","CRITICAL","CHARGING","FULL","HIGH"],"example":"LOW","description":"The current status of the battery, which indicates its operational state."},"stateOfHealth":{"type":"string","enum":["LOW","FULL","CRITICAL","HIGH","CHARGING"],"description":"The overall health of the battery, which reflects its long-term capacity and performance."},"chargePercentage":{"type":"integer","maximum":100,"description":"The current charge level of the battery, represented as a percentage."}}}],"description":"Additional data associated with the heartbeat event, referencing different event types."}}},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"eventName":"heartbeat","timestamp":"2019-08-24T14:15:22Z","eventNumber":120,"data":{"inventoryStatus":{"rfidStatus":"INPROGRESS","tagCount":45,"scanCount":128},"batteryAlert":{"status":"HIGH","stateOfHealth":"FULL","chargePercentage":85}}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
